top3.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
GROUP BY superhero.id, superhero_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
GROUP BY s.id, superhero_name
ORDER BY COUNT(hp.power_id) DESC
LIMIT 1

FROM superhero

GROUP BY superhero.id, superhero_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY COUNT(hp.power_id) DESC
LIMIT 1

LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT superhero_name
FROM superhero
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
GROUP BY superhero.id, superhero_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
